home.heroTitle: We design web experiences that turn *visitors into clients.*
home.heroSubtitle: At ARIXV we design and develop websites, ecommerce platforms and digital solutions strategically built to grow your business.

services.title: Digital solutions built to scale with your business.
services.subtitle: We create fast, scalable and strategically designed web experiences that help companies grow and stand out online.

dev.title: Web Development
dev.desc: We build fast, secure and scalable websites using modern technologies to ensure long-term performance and reliability.

ecommerce.title: Ecommerce
ecommerce.desc: We develop conversion-focused ecommerce platforms with seamless checkout experiences designed to increase sales.

design.title: Web Design
design.desc: We design modern, intuitive and visually refined interfaces that communicate your brand and improve user experience.

maintenance.title: Website Maintenance
maintenance.desc: We keep your website updated, secure and performing at its best through continuous monitoring and technical support.

portfolio.title: Projects that create digital impact.
portfolio.subtitle: Each project reflects our strategic approach, combining design, technology, and real business objectives.

projects.title: Nexa
projects.desc: A real estate digital platform focused on user experience and conversion. Nexa delivers a clean, minimal visual journey that allows users to explore properties for sale, giving full prominence to each space while enabling seamless direct contact between buyers and sellers.

projects.title: Flow Supplement
projects.desc: Design and development of a conversion-focused eCommerce experience for Flow Supplements Company, optimizing user experience, product navigation, and the purchasing process.

projects.title: Bloom preschool
projects.desc: Design and development of a digital experience for Bloom Preschool, creating a platform that communicates its bilingual educational approach, Reggio Emilia philosophy, and a creative, emotional, and multisensory learning environment.

projects.title: Muse
projects.desc: Digital experience design for MUSE Beauty Studio, focused on translating the salon’s exclusivity into the web environment through a minimal interface, personalized booking flows for 'VIP Rituals', and a visual narrative that highlights the essence and detail of each service.

process.title: How we bring ideas to life.
process.subtitle: A clear and collaborative workflow designed to deliver outstanding results at every stage.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We analyze your business, goals and audience to define a clear digital strategy.

steps.title: Architecture & Planning
steps.desc: We design the project structure, key features and technical foundation for scalability.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: We build the solution using modern technologies focused on performance and security.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: We test, deploy and provide ongoing support to ensure long-term success.

about.title: Technology, design and strategy in one team.
about.description: We are a digital studio focused on building custom web experiences. We combine art direction, modern engineering and strategic thinking to create fast, scalable platforms designed for real results.

pillars.title: Custom Code
pillars.desc: We develop tailored solutions using modern technologies to achieve maximum performance.

pillars.title: Purpose-Driven Design
pillars.desc: Every visual decision supports communication goals and user experience.

pillars.title: Results-Focused
pillars.desc: We build digital platforms designed to convert visitors into business opportunities.

items.question: How long does it take to develop a website?
items.answer: It depends on the scope of the project. A landing page can take around 2 weeks, while a complete corporate website typically takes between 4 and 6 weeks to design, develop, and optimize.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: We work with different technologies depending on each project's needs. We build modern solutions using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, and also implement platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, and other tools when the project requires it.

items.question: Will the website be mobile-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. We follow a Mobile-First approach to ensure an optimal experience across smartphones, tablets, and desktop devices.

items.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance?
items.answer: Yes, we provide maintenance and support plans to keep your website updated, secure, and running at peak performance.

items.content: The level of detail and technical execution was outstanding. The team fully understood our vision and delivered a high-performance digital experience.
items.author: Alex Rivera

items.content: Working with ARIXV transformed how we approach our digital presence. The speed, communication, and final quality exceeded our expectations.
items.author: Sofia Chen

items.content: A highly professional team with strong design and engineering capabilities. The entire process was smooth, structured, and results-driven.
items.author: Marcus Thorne

contact.title: Let's build something together.
contact.description: Tell us about your project. From premium landing pages to complex platforms, we're ready to help.

footer.description: Boutique web development and high-performance digital experiences combining premium aesthetics and clean engineering.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to ARIXV. By accessing our website and using our services, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions.
These terms govern the relationship between ARIXV and its clients regarding web development, design, and digital solutions.
If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Services
paragraphs: ARIXV provides web development, UI/UX design, ecommerce solutions, and website maintenance services.
Each project is defined through a proposal or agreement outlining scope, deliverables, timelines, and pricing.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All code, design, and digital assets created during the project remain the property of ARIXV until full payment is received.
Once payment is completed, usage rights of the final product are transferred to the client.
ARIXV reserves the right to showcase completed projects in its portfolio and promotional materials.

sections.title: 4. Workflow and Deliverables
paragraphs: Projects follow a structured workflow including planning, design, development, and delivery phases.
list: Revisions: The number of revisions is defined in the proposal. Additional changes may incur extra costs.
Communication: We aim to respond within 24–48 business hours.
Delivery timelines may vary depending on project complexity and client responsiveness.

sections.title: 5. Payments
paragraphs: A 50% upfront payment is required to begin any project.
The remaining 50% must be paid before final delivery or deployment.
All payments are non-refundable once the project has started.

sections.title: 6. Client Responsibilities
list: Provide required content, information, and access credentials on time.
Review and approve deliverables within agreed timelines.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: ARIXV is not liable for indirect damages, business losses, or service interruptions resulting from the use of delivered products.
The client is responsible for the final use of the website and compliance with applicable laws.

sections.title: 8. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: ARIXV reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Updates will be published on this page.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
paragraphs: At ARIXV, we respect your privacy. We collect only the information necessary to provide and improve our services.
This may include your name, email address, project details, and technical browsing data through cookies.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
paragraphs: We use your information for the following purposes:
list: To respond to inquiries and project requests.
To provide and improve our digital services.
To analyze website usage and enhance user experience.
To comply with legal and tax obligations.

sections.title: 3. Data Protection
paragraphs: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data.
We do not sell or share personal data with third parties unless required to deliver services or comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
paragraphs: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze traffic.
You may disable cookies through your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. User Rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time.
You may also object to the processing of your data or request its removal from our records.

sections.title: 6. Legal Compliance (Mexico)
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy complies with the Mexican Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP).
Users may exercise their ARCO rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation, and Opposition) by contacting us directly.

sections.title: 7. Changes to this Policy
paragraphs: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page.
